title: VDD triage: 3-layer pipeline hardcoded, cannot inject custom layers (OCP)
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

**Dimension:** Architectural Alignment / OCP
**Location:** src/vdd/mod.rs:803-878 (triage_findings)
**Violation:** `triage_findings` hardcodes three layers (duplicate detection, pattern matching, AI verification) inline with match-style branching. Adding a new triage layer (e.g., a CVE database lookup, a git blame check, or a user-specific allowlist) requires editing this 75-line method. This violates Open/Closed: the module should be extensible without modification.
**Mandated Refactor:** Define `trait TriageLayer { async fn classify(&self, finding: &Finding, ctx: &TriageCtx) -> Option<FindingStatus>; }`. Build a `Vec<Box<dyn TriageLayer>>` in order and drive with a single loop that short-circuits once a finding is classified non-Genuine. Existing layers become three structs: DuplicateDetector, CommonPatternDetector, AiVerifier. The engine composes the pipeline at construction time from config.
